texto: To act the part of a true friend requires more conscientious feeling than to fill with credit and complacency any other station or capacity in social life.
explicacao: Citação de Sarah Ellis sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “To act the part of a true friend requires more conscientious feeling than to fill with credit and…” articula amizade, reflexao, friend em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

texto: What if you could just invent your family, your home, your life? You could. You could call Sunday Wednesday. Be awake and living at 3 a.m. Use T-shirts instead of sheets. Eat lettuce like an apple. Blow your nose on socks. Take four unrelated people and make a family.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sarah Ellis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “What if you could just invent your family, your home, your life? You could. You could call Sunday…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, family, could pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
